nasb.text: When they bring you before the synagogues and the rulers and the authorities, do not worry about how or what you are to speak in your defense, or what you are to say;

esv.text: And when they bring you before the synagogues and the rulers and the authorities, do not be anxious about how you should defend yourself or what you should say,

cnv.text: 人把你們拉到會堂、官長和當權者的面前，你們不要思慮怎樣申辯或說甚麼話。

ccb.text: 当人押你们到会堂，或到官员和当权者面前时，不要顾虑如何辩解，或说什么话，

csbs.text: 当他们把你们带到会堂，或带到统治者和掌权者面前的时候，不要忧虑怎样申辩或说什么。
